title: RESTORE - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY BEAVERTON RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donation pick-up is available. 13475 SW Millikan Way Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday-Monday 10am-6pm; donations accepted until 5:45pm Email (503) 906-3823 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 906-3823 Intake (971) 229-8888 Donation Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Items priced individually; cash and credit cards accepted. Donation pick-up $40. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Wednesday-Monday 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: At the corner of SW Millikan Way and SW Hocken Avenue. TriMet bus line 62 on SW Millikan Way. Services: Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
